Defendants Swissport Sa Llc And Swissport Usa Incs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):

DEFENDANTS SWISSPORT USA, INC. AND SWISSPORT SA, LLC's Motion To Stay.

Matter called, ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendants Swissport SA, LLC and Swissport USA, Inc.'s motion to stay is granted based on the doctrine of exclusive concurrent jurisdiction.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
